objective: Turn Cursor plugin discovery into tracked installs, Pro checkout starts, and qualified team conversations.

canonicalIdentity.githubDescription: Agent governance for ThumbGate: 👍/👎 become Pre-Action Checks that block repeat mistakes before code, money, or customer systems change.
canonicalIdentity.shortDescription: 👍👎 Thumbs down a mistake — your AI agent won't repeat it. Thumbs up good work — it remembers the pattern.
canonicalIdentity.longDescription: 👍👎 Thumbs down a mistake — your AI agent won't repeat it. Thumbs up good work — it remembers the pattern. ThumbGate adds pre-action checks, prevention rules, history-aware lesson distillation, and proof-ready workflow evidence for Cursor agents. When the feedback starts as a vague thumbs-down, ThumbGate can ground it in up to 8 prior recorded entries plus the failed tool call, then keep a linked 60-second follow-up open so the lesson becomes reusable instead of getting lost in chat history.

surfaces.name: Cursor Marketplace
surfaces.operatorStatus: Refresh after copy, README, screenshots, or proof positioning changes.
surfaces.buyer: Cursor users who want the fastest install path for repeated-mistake prevention.
surfaces.shortDescription: 👍👎 Thumbs down a mistake — your AI agent won't repeat it. Thumbs up good work — it remembers the pattern.
surfaces.longDescription: 👍👎 Thumbs down a mistake — your AI agent won't repeat it. Thumbs up good work — it remembers the pattern. ThumbGate adds pre-action checks, prevention rules, history-aware lesson distillation, and proof-ready workflow evidence for Cursor agents. When the feedback starts as a vague thumbs-down, ThumbGate can ground it in up to 8 prior recorded entries plus the failed tool call, then keep a linked 60-second follow-up open so the lesson becomes reusable instead of getting lost in chat history.

surfaces.name: Cursor Directory
surfaces.operatorStatus: Refresh independently from npm publishes when positioning changes.
surfaces.buyer: Researchers and buyers comparing Cursor plugins before install.
surfaces.shortDescription: Pre-action checks that block AI agents from repeating known mistakes. Captures feedback, auto-generates prevention rules, and enforces them via PreToolUse hooks.
surfaces.longDescription: Use the directory profile to explain the repeated-mistake problem, then route serious readers to the Marketplace or homepage with tracked links. Lead with the outcome before architecture: stop costly AI agent mistakes, then mention pre-action checks, prevention rules, and proof.

surfaces.name: Cursor Team Marketplace
surfaces.role: Private repo-backed install surface for teams and enterprise admins
surfaces.operatorStatus: Use when a team wants repo-backed refresh and internal rollout control.
surfaces.buyer: Teams standardizing one valuable Cursor workflow before broader rollout.
surfaces.shortDescription: Repo-backed ThumbGate install path for teams that need shared pre-action checks, workflow proof, and controlled plugin refresh.
surfaces.longDescription: Pitch the Team Marketplace only after a buyer already named one repeated workflow failure, one owner, and one approval boundary. ThumbGate Teams starts with the Workflow Hardening Sprint, then expands to shared prevention gates, proof review, and repo-backed refresh.

followOnOffers.label: ThumbGate Pro
followOnOffers.buyer: Solo operators who want the self-serve dashboard and proof-ready exports after install.

followOnOffers.label: Workflow Hardening Sprint
followOnOffers.pricingModel: Workflow Hardening Sprint, then Team at $49/seat/mo with 3-seat minimum after qualification
followOnOffers.buyer: Teams who already named one repeated workflow failure and need rollout proof.

screenshots.reason: Lead screenshot for the install surface.
Shows the CLI and pre-action workflow in use.
Explains the feedback-to-enforcement loop for new buyers.
Shows the proof and dashboard layer behind the paid path.
Helps directory readers understand the differentiation quickly.

measurementPlan.policy: Treat Cursor Marketplace installs as acquisition evidence only after a tracked follow-on event exists.

milestones.goal: Refresh the Marketplace listing, directory profile, and screenshot set with the tracked setup guide plus proof links.
milestones.decision: Do not rewrite the value prop until guide clicks or installs show a clear mismatch.

milestones.goal: Promote whichever follow-on motion converts better: Pro self-serve or Workflow Hardening Sprint.
milestones.decision: If installs happen without paid intent, move proof and follow-on offers higher in post-install docs.

milestones.goal: Decide whether Cursor should stay a plugin-only lane or become a team rollout channel.
milestones.decision: Only prioritize Team Marketplace motion when qualified conversations exist.

successThresholds.minimumUsefulSignal: one tracked Pro checkout start or one qualified team conversation
successThresholds.strongSignal: three tracked paid-intent events across Pro or team motion
doNotCountAsSuccess: installs without a tracked follow-on event
unverified revenue or marketplace approval claims
